subcodes.first_line: O Abu-Tálib! Fix thine eye upon this blessed Word which is even as a crown upon the head of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا طالب باینکلمه مبارکه که بمثابه اکلیل است از برای راس عرفان ناظر باش ضع
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
